mapper.select: /* SQL ID : OnlnPltfrmAuthrtDAO.onlnPltfrmAuthrtSelect 설 명 : 온라인플랫폼권한조회 */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_ONLN_PLTFRM_AUTHRT WHERE TKN_EXP_DTTM > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND ONLN_PLTFRM_STNG_ID = #{onlnPltfrmStngId} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : OnlnPltfrmAuthrtDAO.onlnPltfrmAuthrtRegist 설 명 : 온라인플랫폼권한등록 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_ONLN_PLTFRM_AUTHRT AUTHRT USING ( SELECT #{onlnPltfrmAuthrtId} AS ONLN_PLTFRM_AUTHRT_ID , #{onlnPltfrmStngId} AS ONLN_PLTFRM_STNG_ID , #{authrtTkn} AS AUTHRT_TKN , #{tknExpDttm} AS TKN_EXP_DTTM , #{authrtEml} AS AUTHRT_EML , #{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID FROM DUAL ) AUTH ON ( AUTHRT.ONLN_PLTFRM_STNG_ID = AUTH.ONLN_PLTFRM_STNG_ID AND AUTHRT.AUTHRT_EML = AUTH.AUTHRT_EML ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET AUTHRT.AUTHRT_TKN = AUTH.AUTHRT_TKN , AUTHRT.TKN_EXP_DTTM = AUTH.TKN_EXP_DTTM , AUTHRT.MDFR_ID = AUTH.RGTR_ID , AUTHRT.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( ONLN_PLTFRM_AUTHRT_ID , ONLN_PLTFRM_STNG_ID , AUTHRT_TKN , TKN_EXP_DTTM , AUTHRT_EML , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( AUTH.ONLN_PLTFRM_AUTHRT_ID , AUTH.ONLN_PLTFRM_STNG_ID , AUTH.AUTHRT_TKN , AUTH.TKN_EXP_DTTM , AUTH.AUTHRT_EML , AUTH.RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() )
